accessibility.rammemorynotice.not_enough: Allocate more RAM to play in a modded Minecraft environment.
info.rammemorynotice.not_enough_memory_t:
We recommend allocate more memory in this modded Minecraft environment.
If the memory allocated to Minecraft is too low, performance may be lagging and may cause crashes.
info.rammemorynotice.not_enough_memory_h:
Offical Minecraft Launcher: 
Go to [Installations], find your profile, click [...], select [Edit] to open [Edit installation], click [MORE OPTIONS], and find [-Xmx2G] in [JVM ARGUMENTS]. Increase the number [2] to allocate more RAM.

CurseForge Launcher: 
Click gear icon (lower left) to open [Settings], select [Minecraft] under [Game Specific], scroll down to the [Allocated Memory] silder. Move the slider to allocate more RAM.
